name: 体积与表面积
subject: math
domain_name: 几何与三角 / Geometry & Trig / Geometry & Trig
curriculum_points:
SL 1.6
Content Guidance, clarification and syllabus links
Simple deductive proof, numerical and algebraic; 
how to lay out a left-hand side to right-hand side 
(LHS to RHS) proof. 
The symbols and notation for equality and identity.

AHL 1.15
Content Guidance, clarification and syllabus links
Proof by mathematical induction. 
Proof should be incorporated throughout the course 
where appropriate. 
Mathematical induction links specifically to a wide 
variety of topics, for example complex numbers, 
differentiation, sums of sequences and divisibility. 
Proof by contradiction. 
Examples: Irrationality of 3; irrationality of the 
cube root of 5; Euclid’s proof of an infinite number of 
prime numbers; if a is a rational number and b is an 
irrational number, then a+b is an irrational number. 
Use of a counterexample to show that a statement is 
not always true. 
Example: Consider the set P of numbers of the form 
n2+41n+41, n∈ℕ, show that not all elements of 
P are prime. 
Example: Show that the following statement is not 
always true: there are no positive integer solutions 
to the equation x2+y2=10. 
It is not sufficient to state the counterexample alone. 
Students must explain why their example is a 
counterexample.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「体积与表面积」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：SL 1.6
Content Guidance, clarification and syllabus links
Simple deductive proof, numerical and algebraic; 
how to lay o…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：AHL 1.15
Content Guidance, clarification and syllabus links
Proof by mathematica… 对理解「体积与表面积」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
